reason: Codex review-and-fix ran and applied edits to all three deliverables (context.md/answer.md/reasoning.md modified during this run; verified by me: proposed-method-result leak removals, baseline gaps softened to observed-limitations, VGG param count corrected to 1472, the squared-difference 1x1-conv nonnegative-coefficient faithfulness note, and v0.0/v0.1 versioning + model loading added to the answer.md code to match the canonical lpips package), but the codex-companion process was terminated (SIGTERM / exit 144) under heavy host load before flushing a clean completed changelog. Per the skill rule, not marking codex_reviewed:true for an errored runtime. All edits were re-verified manually against the primary paper (arXiv:1801.03924, full LaTeX source) and the canonical richzhang/PerceptualSimilarity implementation; deliverables confirmed correct, in-frame, and faithful.
